author: claude
content: CONVERGED (VDD R3): All R2 findings fixed — parquet_schema.py synced with redirect_url+used_address, test_values.py updated, DNS test asserts content not just count, type annotations consistent. Remaining minors: Schema-Documentation.md gap (pre-existing), is_TRR type mismatch in schema.ts (pre-existing), redirect_url naming is slightly misleading (captures request URL not HTTP redirect target). Verdict: Begrudgingly Adequate. Ready for PR.
